name: Sunday Special (Charlene Hatfield)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the Oreos in a blender.
2. Combine the Oreos and butter. Set aside 1/4 cup.
3. Spread the remaining mixture over the bottom of a 13 X 9 pan, covering the bottom.
4. Slice the ice cream over the top of the cookie crumbs, covering the bottom.
5. Mix together 1 cup sugar, 1 cup evaporated milk, and 3 ounces chocolate in a saucepan. Bring to a full boil.
6. Let cool before pouring over the ice cream.
7. Spread the Cool Whip over the chocolate mixture.
8. Sprinkle with the reserved Oreo crumbs and chopped nuts.
9. Freeze until ready to serve.
